name: Coconut Pecan Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease the bottom only of a 13x9-inch pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine brownie mix, water, oil, and egg. Beat well.
4. Add frosting and sour cream; mix well.
5. Spread batter in the prepared pan.
6. Sprinkle pecans and chocolate chips evenly over the top.
7. Bake for 42-52 minutes (until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean).
8. Allow to cool completely before cutting into 36 bars.
